OPENBAO_VERSION.description: Specific version of openbao to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

OPENBAO_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install OPENBAO. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

OPENBAO_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for OPENBAO to listen on

OPENBAO_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for OPENBAO to listen on

OPENBAO_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for OPENBAO to listen on

OPENBAO_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the service under (leave empty for Network Service).

OPENBAO_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the Windows local user account (if applicable).

OPENBAO_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Windows Service (allows side-by-side installations).
